tiles.title: Total Invocations
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'

tiles.title: Total Chat Calls
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS chat_calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat'

tiles.title: Total Tool Calls
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS tool_calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool'

tiles.title: Total Cost ($)
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS total_cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp) IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Total Token Usage
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS total_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat'
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Avg Cost per Invocation
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(invocation_cost_usd), 6) AS avg_invocation_cost_usd
FROM (
  SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS invocation_cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
) t
WHERE invocation_cost_usd IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: P95 Cost per Invocation
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(invocation_cost_usd, 0.95), 6) AS p95_invocation_cost_usd
FROM (
  SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS invocation_cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
) t
WHERE invocation_cost_usd IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Cost Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cost Rate of Change
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH hourly AS (
  SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin,
         SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY time_bin
)
SELECT time_bin,
       ROUND(cost_usd, 6) AS cost_usd,
       ROUND(cost_usd - LAG(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin), 6) AS cost_change_usd,
       ROUND((cost_usd - LAG(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(LAG(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin), 0), 2) AS cost_change_pct
FROM hourly
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cumulative Cost
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH hourly AS (
  SELECT date_bin('1 min', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin,
         SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY time_bin
)
SELECT time_bin,
       ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 6) AS cumulative_cost_usd
FROM hourly
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cost per Token Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) / NULLIF(SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)), 0), 10) AS cost_per_token_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: RSS Memory
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by Provider and Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.provider.name", 'inferred') AS provider,
       COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model,
       COUNT(*) AS events,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd,
       ROUND(AVG(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS avg_event_cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY provider, model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Model Cost Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin,
       COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin, model
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, model ASC

tiles.title: Highest Cost Invocations
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT span_trace_id,
       MIN(p_timestamp) AS start_time,
       COALESCE(MAX("gen_ai.provider.name"), 'inferred') AS provider,
       COALESCE(MAX("gen_ai.request.model"), MAX("gen_ai.response.model"), 'unknown') AS model,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd,
       SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS input_tokens,
       SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS output_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY span_trace_id
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Invocation Cost Distribution
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT CASE
         WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.001 THEN '< $0.001'
         WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.01 THEN '$0.001 - $0.01'
         WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.05 THEN '$0.01 - $0.05'
         WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.10 THEN '$0.05 - $0.10'
         ELSE '>= $0.10'
       END AS cost_bucket,
       COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM (
  SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS invocation_cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
) t
WHERE invocation_cost_usd IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY cost_bucket ASC

tiles.title: Cost vs Tokens by Invocation
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT span_trace_id,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd,
       SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS total_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY span_trace_id
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Unpriced Events
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unpriced_events
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp) IS NULL

tiles.title: Pricing Coverage
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp) IS NOT NULL) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS pricing_coverage_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Unpriced Models
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.provider.name", 'inferred') AS provider,
       COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model,
       COUNT(*) AS unpriced_events
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp) IS NULL
GROUP BY provider, model
ORDER BY unpriced_events DESC
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Cached Input Share
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(CAST(COALESCE("gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens", '0') AS DOUBLE)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE)), 0), 2) AS cached_input_share_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat'
  AND COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Output / Input Token Ratio (%)
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE)), 0), 2) AS output_input_ratio_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat'
  AND COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Cost per Successful Outcome
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH invocation_cost AS (
  SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
), outcomes AS (
  SELECT span_trace_id, MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.response.finish_reasons", '') LIKE '%submitted%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success
  FROM $trace_dataset
  WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(c.cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(o.success), 0), 6) AS cost_per_success_usd
FROM invocation_cost c
JOIN outcomes o ON c.span_trace_id = o.span_trace_id

tiles.title: Success Rate
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.response.finish_reasons", '') LIKE '%submitted%') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id), 0), 2) AS success_rate_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'

tiles.title: Cost per Agent Job Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH invocation_cost AS (
  SELECT span_trace_id, date_bin('1 minute', MIN(p_timestamp), '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
)
SELECT time_bin, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_cost_per_agent_job_usd, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(cost_usd, 0.95), 6) AS p95_cost_per_agent_job_usd
FROM invocation_cost
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cost by Outcome
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH invocation_cost AS (
  SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd
  FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
), outcomes AS (
  SELECT span_trace_id, COALESCE(MAX("gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"), 'unknown') AS outcome
  FROM $trace_dataset
  WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
  GROUP BY span_trace_id
)
SELECT outcome, COUNT(*) AS invocations, ROUND(SUM(c.cost_usd), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM invocation_cost c
LEFT JOIN outcomes o ON c.span_trace_id = o.span_trace_id
GROUP BY outcome
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by User
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("username", 'unknown') AS username,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd,
       COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY username
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by Agent Name
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.name", 'unknown') AS agent_name,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd,
       COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY agent_name
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by User and Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("username", 'unknown') AS username,
       COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY username, model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Cost by Agent and Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.name", 'unknown') AS agent_name,
       COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model,
       ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
  AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY agent_name, model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30
